tools.name: c2n_fetch_page
tools.description: Fetch a Confluence page by ID or URL and return its raw XHTML body plus metadata. Read-only.

pageIdOrUrl.description: Confluence page ID or full page URL.

baseUrl.description: Optional Confluence base URL override; falls back to CONFLUENCE_BASE_URL.

tools.name: c2n_convert_page
tools.description: Convert a Confluence XHTML body into Notion blocks using the deterministic converter and the current ruleset. Read-only.

xhtml.description: Confluence storage-format XHTML for a single page.

pageId.description: Optional source page ID; threaded into unresolved entries.

title.description: Optional source page title for diagnostic logging.

tools.name: c2n_list_runs
tools.description: List migration runs recorded under output/runs/. Read-only.

rootDir.description: Optional alternate runs root; defaults to ./output/runs.

tools.name: c2n_get_run_report
tools.description: Read the report.json for a migration run by its slug. Read-only.

tools.name: c2n_migrate_page
tools.description: Migrate a single Confluence page to Notion (write). Pass dryRun: true to run the conversion without calling the Notion API.

pageIdOrUrl.description: Confluence page ID or URL to migrate.

parentNotionPageId.description: Notion parent page ID under which the new page is created.

dryRun.description: If true, perform conversion only and report intended writes without calling the Notion API.
